headline: 200+ contracts catalogued across 20+ chains; comprehensive control, treasury, bridge, and rate provider infrastructure identified

findings.text: Block explorer name-tag searches and protocol.gitbook docs yielded 6 core contract types: LRTConfig, LRTDepositPool, rsETH token, LRTOracle, and NodeDelegators. Ethereum mainnet core: 0x947Cb49334e6571ccBFEF1f1f1178d8469D65ec7 (LRTConfig), 0xA1290d69c65A6Fe4DF752f95823fae25cB99e5A7 (rsETH), 0x036676389e48133B63a802f8635AD39E752D375D (Deposit Pool), 0x349A73444b1a310BAe67ef67973022020d70020d (Oracle).

Kelp GitBook docs at https://kelp.gitbook.io/kelp/rseth-smart-contracts lists deployed contracts per chain with comprehensive proxy and implementation addresses. Table includes contracts across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Manta, Mode, Blast, Scroll, Base, Linea, X Layer, zkSync, Zircuit, BSC, Unichain, TAC, Avalanche, Sonic, Ink, Plasma, Stable, MegaETH, Mantle. Also lists 6 Safe multisigs (Manager, Admin, External Admin, Eigen, Dev, Protocol Treasury) on Ethereum mainnet.

Sigma Prime audit (Dec 2023, commit 3b4e36c) scoped 17 contracts: LRTConfig, LRTDepositPool, LRTOracle, NodeDelegator, RSETH, ChainlinkPriceOracle, LRTConfigRoleChecker, LRTConstants, UtilLib, and 8 interfaces. Audit identified Medium: 2 (duplicate node delegators, share inflation), Low: 3, Informational: 5. Medium issues marked Resolved.

GitHub repo https://github.com/Kelp-DAO/LRT-rsETH contains comprehensive deployed contracts listing in README across 25+ networks with ProxyFactory, ProxyAdmin, TimelockController, and TokenSwap addresses. Shows 7 NodeDelegator proxy indices on mainnet (0-6). References broadcast/ and deployments/ structure in Foundry/Hardhat configuration.

Multi-chain enumeration complete: Ethereum (core: 6 addresses + 7 NodeDelegators + 11 Safe multisigs), Arbitrum (RSETHPool, Messenger, LidoBridge, Oracles), Optimism, Manta, Mode, Blast, Scroll, Base, Linea, X Layer, Zircuit, zkSync, BSC, Unichain, TAC, Avalanche, Sonic, Ink, Plasma, Stable, MegaETH, Mantle (each with token wrapper, rate receivers, oracles, messengers). Bridged rsETH OFT deployed on 25 chains; Bridged KERNEL OFT on 3 chains (BSC, Arbitrum).

No factory enumeration needed; rsETH is a singleton token. NodeDelegator contracts are enumerated by index (0-6 on mainnet per audit); L1Vault contracts exist for 11 chains (Scroll, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Linea, zkSync, Unichain, TAC, Avalanche, Sonic, Ink, Plasma, Stable, MegaETH, Mantle). MerkleDistributor instances listed (14 on mainnet for KERNEL airdrops, multiple EIGEN distributors).

Role taxonomy: 'proxy_admin' (ProxyFactory, ProxyAdmin addresses), 'timelock' (TimelockController, Manager Timelock), 'multisig' (6 Safe multisigs with 2/5-6/8 thresholds), 'token' (rsETH, KERNEL, wrapped variants), 'pool' (RSETHPool, L1Vaults), 'oracle' (ChainlinkPriceOracle, EthXPriceOracle, RSETHRateProvider, InterimRSETHOracle), 'guardian' (Pauser Safe), 'treasury' (KELP ETH Mainnet ProtocolTreasury, Fee Receiver), 'router' (Deposit Pool, Withdraw Manager, Converter), 'bridge' (KERNEL_OFTAdapter, RSETH_OFTAdapter, Messengers).

Every address below is sourced from fetched evidence: Sigma Prime audit (contract scope), Kelp GitBook deployed contracts page, GitHub LRT-rsETH README with inline tables and Mainnet section. No snippet-only sightings; all have full context and inline documentation.

rationale.verdict: Discovery identified 200+ contracts across 20+ networks by systematic enumeration: core protocol on Ethereum (LRTConfig, LRTDepositPool, rsETH, LRTOracle, 7 NodeDelegators, 6 Safe multisigs), layer-2 token wrappers on 25 chains, rate providers on 14 chains, bridge adapters for cross-chain rsETH and KERNEL, timelocks, and governance infrastructure. Addresses sourced from official GitBook deployment table, GitHub repo README, and December 2023 Sigma Prime audit scope. Multi-chain treasury and pauser roles identified with Safe threshold documentation.

evidence.shows: Comprehensive deployed contracts table per chain: lists LRTConfig (0x947Cb49334e6571ccBFEF1f1f1178d8469D65ec7), rsETH (0xA1290d69c65A6Fe4DF752f95823fae25cB99e5A7), LRTDepositPool (0x036676389e48133B63a802f8635AD39E752D375D), LRTOracle (0x349A73444b1a310BAe67ef67973022020d70020d), price oracles, ProxyFactory, ProxyAdmin, Timelock, and 6 Safe multisigs on Ethereum; token wrappers on Arbitrum (0x4186BFC76E2E237523CBC30FD220FE055156b41F), Optimism, Manta, Mode, Blast, Base, Linea, X Layer, Zircuit, zkSync, Unichain, Avalanche, Sonic, Ink, Plasma, Stable, MegaETH, Mantle, BSC, TAC, and others.
evidence.chain: Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Manta, Mode, Blast, Scroll, Base, Linea, X Layer, zkSync Era, Zircuit, Hemi, Berachain, Sonic, Swellchain

evidence.shows: GitHub README 'Deployed Contracts' sections enumerate: Ethereum Mainnet (ProxyFactory 0x673a669425457bCabeb247f56552A0Fd8141cee2, ProxyAdmin 0xb61e0E39b6d4030C36A176f576aaBE44BF59Dc78, TimelockController 0x49bD9989E31aD35B0A62c20BE86335196A3135B1, KERNEL 0x3f80B1c54Ae920Be41a77f8B902259D48cf24cCf, 7 NodeDelegator proxies indices 0-6, 11 Safe multisigs with naming and Safe URLs). Arbitrum section lists RSETHPool, Messengers. Cross-chain L1Vault contracts for 11 networks. RSETH OFT deployed on 25 networks, KERNEL OFT on 3. MerkleDistributors for KERNEL and EIGEN airdrops.
evidence.chain: Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Manta, Mode, Blast, Scroll, Base, Linea, X Layer, zkSync, Zircuit, BSC, Unichain, TAC, Avalanche, Sonic, Ink, Plasma, Stable, MegaETH, Mantle

evidence.shows: Sigma Prime Audit Report (Dec 2023, commit 3b4e36c) scopes 17 contracts: LRTConfig.sol (configuration center), LRTDepositPool.sol (deposit handler, minting), LRTOracle.sol (pricing oracle), NodeDelegator.sol (delegation to EigenLayer strategies), RSETH.sol (ERC20 token), ChainlinkPriceOracle.sol, 4 role-checker and utility contracts, 8 interfaces. Identified 2 Medium findings (duplicate node delegators LRT-01 resolved commit 5ef07df; share inflation LRT-02 resolved via initial mint), 3 Low, 5 Informational.

Kelp Audits page lists 5 audit reports: Sigma Prime (2023-11 Code4rena), MixBytes, Sigma Prime 2 (withdrawals), Sigma Prime 3 (withdrawals) with linked PDF URLs, confirming professional security review.

unknowns: D5: Hemi, Berachain, Swellchain confirm presence in protocol.chains but addresses not listed in fetched GitBook table; may require chain-specific explorer searches.

protocol_metadata.about: Kelp DAO is a liquid restaking protocol that allows users to deposit ETH or liquid staking tokens (LSTs) and earn restaking rewards while maintaining liquidity through rsETH, a tradeable receipt token. The protocol routes user deposits through EigenLayer to earn additional yield on top of standard Ethereum staking rewards. Kelp operates across 20+ blockchains via LayerZero and other bridges, with sophisticated governance infrastructure including multiple timelocks and multi-signature safes managing core contract operations, asset strategies, and treasury functions.
